# MCPFind — Open-Source MCP Server Directory
> mcpfind.org indexes 7,299+ Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers across 21 categories. Browse, search, and install MCP servers for Claude Desktop, Cursor, VS Code, Windsurf, and GitHub Copilot.

## Key Pages
- https://mcpfind.org/ — Homepage with search and category browsing
- https://mcpfind.org/categories — All 21 server categories
- https://mcpfind.org/blog — Technical tutorials and guides
- https://mcpfind.org/submit — Submit a new MCP server

## Categories
databases, cloud, monitoring, security, testing, analytics, automation, media, documentation, social, ecommerce, devtools, communication, filesystems, search, ai-ml, finance, crm, productivity, maps, other

## API
- Sitemap: https://mcpfind.org/sitemap.xml
